name: Zhuohe Duan
content: I recently purchased a new construction home in Cliffside Park with Emma representing me as the buyer. From day one, her relationships with local builders and deep knowledge of the area helped us spot value and negotiate a strong deal. Midway through, there were miscommunications and misunderstandings that made me worry the transaction might not go through. Emma stayed patient and steady, and proactively coordinated with the listing agent, both attorneys, and the title company to keep us on track. We also had a punch list of items that should have been finished before closing; Emma tracked every item, communicated frequently with the property manager, and pushed to get things resolved as quickly as possible. She was responsive, organized, and on top of every detail. I’m very happy with the outcome and highly recommend Emma to anyone buying in the area.
content_zh: 我最近在 Cliffside Park 购买了一套新建住宅，由 Emma 担任我的买方经纪人。从第一天起，她与当地建筑商的良好关系和对该地区的深入了解就帮助我们发现了房产价值，并谈判出了一个很好的交易。在交易进行到一半时，由于沟通不畅和误解，我曾担心交易可能无法完成。但 Emma 始终保持耐心和稳健，积极与卖方经纪人、双方律师和产权公司协调，确保交易顺利进行。在过户前，我们还有一份需要完成的待办事项清单；Emma 跟踪了每一项，频繁与物业经理沟通，并推动问题尽快解决。她反应迅速、有条理，且能掌控每一个细节。我对结果非常满意，并向所有在该地区买房的人强烈推荐 Emma。

name: Kaiyuan Sun
content:
We feel very fortunate to have worked with Emma as our real estate agent. Throughout the entire process, she demonstrated outstanding professionalism and dedication:

Extremely knowledgeable and professional
Emma has a deep understanding and very good resources of the local housing market and kept us informed of the latest opportunities. Thanks to her, we were able to secure a pre-sale opportunity at a price below market value, which allowed us to purchase the home we truly wanted.

Always protecting the buyer’s interests
Emma consistently put our interests first. During the attorney review, she communicated with the seller on our behalf and successfully negotiated more favorable contract terms than what was originally offered. This gave us great confidence and peace of mind throughout the process.

Support beyond closing
Even after closing, Emma continued to follow up with the developer on issues that required attention. She never acted like her job was “done” once the deal closed—instead, she made sure we were fully taken care of and comfortable in our new home.

Overall, Emma is a highly professional, attentive, and responsible agent. She not only helped us purchase our dream home at an excellent price but also made the entire experience smooth and worry-free. We would absolutely recommend Emma to anyone looking to buy a home.
content_zh:
我们感到非常幸运能与 Emma 合作，让她担任我们的房地产经纪人。在整个过程中，她展现了出色的专业精神和奉献精神：

极其渊博和专业
Emma 对当地房地产市场有深入的了解和非常好的资源，并随时向我们通报最新机会。多亏了她，我们能够以低于市场价的价格锁定一个预售机会，从而买到了我们真正想要的房子。

始终保护买方利益
Emma 始终将我们的利益放在首位。在律师审查期间，她代表我们与卖方沟通，并成功谈判出了比最初提供的更有利的合同条款。这让我们在整个过程中充满了信心和安心。

过户后的支持
即使在过户后，Emma 仍继续跟进开发商解决需要关注的问题。她从不觉得一旦交易结束她的工作就“完成”了——相反，她确保我们得到了充分的照顾，并能舒适地住在新家里。

总的来说，Emma 是一位非常专业、细心和负责任的经纪人。她不仅帮助我们以极好的价格买到了梦想中的家，而且让整个体验顺畅无忧。我们绝对会向任何想买房的人推荐 Emma。

name: Gary Chin
content: I’ve had the privilege of working with Emma Ju on several real estate transactions, all with significant profitable outcomes.  After searching tirelessly for a knowledgeable, meticulous real estate professional, I found Emma through a referral from a colleague, and from the get-go was impressed.  She used high-tech tools like virtual showings and digital signing, to make the process efficient.  However, she also brought good old fashioned personalized attention to every business transaction.  I found her to be a person of the highest level of integrity, who always provided full transparency in all of our communication.  I look forward to working with Emma on many future deals.  Many thanks, Emma!
content_zh: 我有幸在几笔房地产交易中与 Emma Ju 合作，每一次都获得了可观的利润。在不知疲倦地寻找一位知识渊博、一丝不苟的房地产专业人士后，我通过同事的推荐找到了 Emma，从一开始我就对她印象深刻。她使用虚拟看房和数字签名等高科技工具，使过程更加高效。然而，她也为每一笔商业交易带来了传统的个性化关注。我发现她是一个极具诚信的人，在我们所有的沟通中始终保持完全透明。我期待在未来与 Emma 合作进行更多交易。非常感谢，Emma！

name: JUNJIE Q
content:
I had such a great experience working with Emma! She is super professional, always patient, and really takes the time to explain everything in detail. Buying a home is a big deal in anyone’s life, and I felt I could completely trust her from start to finish.
What impressed me most is that Emma is always there when you need her — quick to respond and never leaves you waiting. She also gave me very smart advice on how to make an offer, what points to highlight to the seller, and how to stay within a reasonable price. That made me feel much more confident during the negotiation process.
On top of that, she has excellent resources, from lawyers and title companies to inspectors, mortgage advice, and even renovation contacts. Everything went so much smoother because of her support.
If you are looking for an agent who is reliable, knowledgeable, and truly cares about her clients, I honestly recommend giving Emma a try. I’m very thankful I had her by my side, and I believe anyone who works with her will feel the same!
content_zh:
我和 Emma 的合作体验太棒了！她超级专业，总是很有耐心，而且真的会花时间详细解释一切。买房是任何人生活中的一件大事，我觉得从头到尾我都可以完全信任她。
最让我印象深刻的是，当您需要她时，Emma 始终在您身边——回复迅速，从不让您等待。她还就如何出价、向卖家强调哪些要点以及如何将价格控制在合理范围内给了我非常明智的建议。这让我在谈判过程中感到更加自信。
最重要的是，她拥有极好的资源，从律师和产权公司到检查员、抵押贷款建议，甚至是装修联系人。因为她的支持，一切都进行得更加顺利。
如果您正在寻找一位可靠、知识渊博且真正关心客户的经纪人，我真诚地建议您给 Emma 一个机会。我非常庆幸有她在我身边，我相信任何与她合作的人都会有同感！

name: Leyla Ning
content:
We have been working with Emma since 2023 while searching for our first home, and she has been an absolute pleasure to work with.  Over the past two years, we have toured more than 100 houses, and throughout the entire process, Emma has remained professional, patient and supportive.  She is extremely responsive and always communicates in a timely manner.  We especially appreciated that she never pressured us or pushed her own opinions, but instead respectfully guided us so we could make the best decisions for our selves. This was a refreshing experience compared to some other agents we met along the way.
In January this year, Emma helped us purchase our new home, and we couldn't be happier. She was strategic during the negotiation process. She was practical, thoughtful and didn't encouraging us to overbid unnecessarily. Thanks for her expertise and guidance, we feel confident that we found the right home at the ideal value.
We are very grateful for Emma's dedication and professionalism, and we would highly recommend her to anyone looking for a trustworthy and knowledgeable real estate agent.
content_zh:
自 2023 年寻找我们的第一套房子以来，我们一直与 Emma 合作，与她共事绝对是一种乐趣。在过去的两年里，我们参观了 100 多套房子，在整个过程中，Emma 始终保持专业、耐心和支持。她反应极其迅速，总是及时沟通。我们特别感激的是，她从不向我们施加压力或强加自己的意见，而是尊重地指导我们，以便我们能为自己做出最佳决定。与我们一路走来遇到的一些其他经纪人相比，这是一次令人耳目一新的经历。
今年 1 月，Emma 帮我们买到了新家，我们再高兴不过了。她在谈判过程中很有策略。她务实、周到，没有鼓励我们进行不必要的超额出价。感谢她的专业知识和指导，我们有信心以理想的价值找到了合适的家。
我们非常感谢 Emma 的奉献精神和专业精神，我们将向任何寻找值得信赖、知识渊博的房地产经纪人的人强烈推荐她。

name: Huang Xena
content: I'd highly recommend Emma! We were first-time buyers living/working in NYC and looking in North Jersey (Bergen County). Emma built a step-by-step plan: budget + commute map, curated tours, and a clear offer strategy. She spotted issues in disclosures/inspection quickly and negotiated sensible credits instead of drama. Her network—lender, attorney, inspector, contractor—was responsive and professional. From accepted offers to closing, timelines were predictable and communication was proactive. We felt informed, never pressured, and always protected. If you want someone who understands first-time buyer concerns and Bergen County’s new-construction landscape, Emma is outstanding!
content_zh: 我强烈推荐 Emma！我们是首次购房者，在纽约生活/工作，正在北新泽西（Bergen 郡）找房。Emma 制定了一个循序渐进的计划：预算 + 通勤地图、精心策划的看房以及清晰的出价策略。她迅速发现了披露/检查中的问题，并谈判出了合理的补偿，而不是制造戏剧性事件。她的网络——贷款人、律师、检查员、承包商——反应迅速且专业。从接受出价到过户，时间线是可预测的，沟通是积极主动的。我们感到知情，从不感到有压力，并且始终受到保护。如果您想要一个了解首次购房者担忧和 Bergen 郡新建房屋情况的人，Emma 绝对是杰出的！

name: Shuhang Liu
content: Emma is highly professional, attentive, and patient. Throughout the entire process of selling our home, she provided objective, detailed, and thoughtful advice, along with efficient and effective execution. We truly value her sincerity, and she was always there whenever we needed her. We’re so grateful to have worked with Emma and look forward to doing so again in the future!
content_zh: Emma 非常专业、细心且耐心。在出售我们房屋的整个过程中，她提供了客观、详细和周到的建议，以及高效和有效的执行。我们非常看重她的真诚，每当我们需要她时，她总是在那里。我们非常感激能与 Emma 合作，并期待未来能再次合作！

name: Jiawei Song
content: As first-time homebuyers, the whole process felt overwhelming—until Emma stepped in. She simplified documents, explained contingencies in plain language, and always offered insight before we even knew what to ask. Thanks to her, we found a home we love without the stress！
content_zh: 作为首次购房者，整个过程让人感到不知所措——直到 Emma 介入。她简化了文件，用通俗易懂的语言解释了意外情况，并且总是在我们知道要问什么之前提供见解。多亏了她，我们在没有压力的情况下找到了一个我们喜欢的家！

name: Chika Kim
content: A realtor like Emma is hard to find. She’s not like many messenger/middlemen type of realtors you unfortunately often come across. She listens to your needs, helps you figure out what will truly work best for you, and is a top negotiator who advocates on your behalf. You don’t have to spell out every little detail for her - she just gets it. And she makes the process fast, smooth, and stress-free. She’s proactive, sharp, and often catch things others missed. In Bergen County’s fierce luxury market where things go quick, Emma is the trustworthy, reliable realtor who gets it done, and I cannot recommend her enough!!
content_zh: 像 Emma 这样的房地产经纪人很难找到。她不像你不幸经常遇到的许多信使/中间人类型的房地产经纪人。她倾听你的需求，帮助你弄清楚什么对你来说才是最好的，并且是一位代表你进行倡导的顶级谈判专家。你不需要向她说明每一个小细节——她就是懂。她使过程快速、顺利且无压力。她积极主动、敏锐，经常能抓住别人遗漏的东西。在 Bergen 郡竞争激烈的豪华市场中，房屋销售迅速，Emma 是一位值得信赖、可靠且能办成事的房地产经纪人，我再怎么推荐她都不为过！！

name: Steve Gan
content: Emma was amazing to work with! She was professional, responsive, resourceful, and most importantly patient with us as first time home buyer. She is extremely knowledgeable about the north Jersey towns and has good connections with the local elite developers. Highly recommend!
content_zh: 和 Emma 合作真是太棒了！她专业、反应迅速、足智多谋，最重要的是，她对我们作为首次购房者非常有耐心。她对北新泽西的城镇非常了解，并与当地精英开发商有良好的联系。强烈推荐！

name: Peter
content: Working with Emma was a game-changer for our first home purchase in Bergen County. She laid out a clear plan from pre-approval to closing, flagged risks early, and coordinated lender/attorney/inspection so everything ran on time. Her local knowledge (new construction + commute options) saved us time and money. We closed smoothly and felt supported at every step—highly recommended.
content_zh: 对于我们在 Bergen 郡首次购房来说，与 Emma 合作改变了游戏规则。她制定了从预先批准到过户的清晰计划，及早标记了风险，并协调了贷款人/律师/检查，以确保一切按时进行。她的当地知识（新建项目 + 通勤选项）为我们节省了时间和金钱。我们顺利过户，并在每一步都感受到了支持——强烈推荐。

name: Eve lyn
content: Working with Emma was like having a trusted friend in the real estate world. She anticipated our needs—from neighborhood vibes to negotiation strategies—and made the entire buying journey feel smooth and supported. We felt heard and cared for every step of the way.
content_zh: 与 Emma 合作就像在房地产界有一个值得信赖的朋友。她预见到了我们的需求——从社区氛围到谈判策略——让整个购房之旅感觉顺畅并充满支持。在每一步我们都感到被倾听和被关心。

name: Christine Yuan
content:
I had an excellent experience working with Lizhen to purchase an investment property in New Jersey. What impressed me most was her patience and genuine listening skills - she never made me feel rushed or pressured into any decisions.
Lizhen demonstrated exceptional integrity throughout the process. She would actually advise me to hold off on making offers until all due diligence was complete, ensuring I was making informed decisions rather than pushing for a quick sale. This level of honesty and professionalism gave me complete confidence in her guidance.
She's incredibly easy to work with and always made sure my specific needs and investment goals were prioritized. Her approach is refreshingly non-pushy while still being proactive and thorough.
I would absolutely recommend Lizhen to anyone looking for a realtor who combines expertise with genuine care for their clients' best interests. She made what could have been a stressful process smooth and enjoyable.
Highly recommend!
content_zh:
我在新泽西购买投资性房产时与 Lizhen 的合作体验非常好。给我印象最深的是她的耐心和真诚倾听的技巧——她从不让我感到仓促或被迫做出任何决定。
Lizhen 在整个过程中展现了非凡的诚信。她实际上会建议我推迟出价，直到所有的尽职调查完成，确保我是在做出明智的决定，而不是为了快速促成销售。这种程度的诚实和专业精神让我对她的指导充满信心。
她非常容易共事，并且始终确保我的具体需求和投资目标得到优先考虑。她的方法令人耳目一新，不咄咄逼人，但同时又积极主动且周到。
我绝对会向任何正在寻找一位将专业知识与真正关心客户最佳利益相结合的房地产经纪人的人推荐 Lizhen。她让本可能充满压力的过程变得顺利和愉快。
强烈推荐！
